title: Declaration specifiers should not be redundant
description: Declaration specifiers should not be redundantAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearreliabilityBugredundantWhy is this an issue?Redundant declaration specifiers should be removed or corrected. Typically, they represent bugs. A specifier modifies the type or pointer to its left.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

noncompliant:
const int const * v1a; // Noncompliant; both const specifiers apply to int
const int const * v1b; // Noncompliant
static static int v2;  // Noncompliant
